findings.message: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.remediation: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.html: This text has insufficient contrast against its background.

findings.message: Heading levels should only increase by one
findings.remediation: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct

findings.message: <html> element must have a lang attribute
findings.remediation: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure every form element has a label

keyboardChecklist.title: No positive tabindex values
keyboardChecklist.details: No elements with tabindex > 0 were found.

keyboardChecklist.title: All interactive elements are keyboard-focusable
keyboardChecklist.details: No interactive elements were found with tabindex="-1".

keyboardChecklist.title: Skip-to-content link present
keyboardChecklist.details: Add a skip-to-content link as the first focusable element to allow keyboard users to skip repeated navigation.

keyboardChecklist.title: Focus indicators are visible
keyboardChecklist.details: Manually verify that every interactive element shows a clearly visible focus indicator when navigated to with the Tab key. Check buttons, links, inputs, and custom controls.

keyboardChecklist.title: No keyboard traps
keyboardChecklist.details: Manually verify that keyboard focus can always move away from every component. Tab and Shift+Tab must not become trapped in any widget (unless it is a modal dialog that intentionally constrains focus).
